name: @nvergez/orchestrator
description: Slack-driven orchestrator-dispatcher daemon: one Claude Code session per Slack thread, delegating work to Orca worktree agents.

scripts.dev:all: ORCHESTRATOR_DB_PATH=${ORCHESTRATOR_DB_PATH:-.dev/orchestrator.db} DASHBOARD_PORT=${DASHBOARD_PORT:-8788} concurrently -n daemon,sidecar,web -c blue,magenta,green --kill-others-on-fail npm:dev npm:dev:sidecar npm:dev:web
scripts.dev:dashboard: DASHBOARD_PORT=${DASHBOARD_PORT:-8788} concurrently -n sidecar,web -c magenta,green --kill-others-on-fail npm:dev:sidecar npm:dev:web
scripts.dev:dashboard:demo: ORCHESTRATOR_DB_PATH=.dev/demo.db DASHBOARD_PORT=${DASHBOARD_PORT:-8788} sh -c 'npm run seed:demo && exec concurrently -n sidecar,web -c magenta,green --kill-others-on-fail npm:dev:sidecar npm:dev:web'
scripts.prepack: npm run build && npm run build:web
